overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring the overgrown post-apocalyptic ruins of Hollow Fort. The clip begins with a cinematic low-angle shot transitioning to standard follow-cam as she walks through lush vegetation, past abandoned rusted vehicles, and finally wades through a shallow river in bright midday sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown ruins entrance with tall grass

events.description: camera rises from ground-level cinematic low-angle to standard third-person follow height

agents.ego_description: Aloy walks through tall grass near vine-covered ruins, surveying the overgrown landscape

entered.detail: tall stone tower covered in vegetation rising against the sky
ruined structure completely overgrown with green vines and moss
dense green grass covering the ground
tall purple flowering plants in the foreground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a cinematic low-angle view of Aloy against a bright blue sky, transitioning to a standard third-person follow camera as she walks through dense tall grass. Vine-covered ruins line the left side while a massive ancient tower looms in the background, establishing the post-apocalyptic setting.

events.description: location name 'Hollow Fort' appears as text overlay in the lower left corner
character turns slightly right while continuing to walk along the dirt path

agents.ego_description: Aloy walks along a winding dirt path through the Hollow Fort area, passing moss-covered ruins and abandoned vehicles

entered.detail: moss-covered rusted vehicle wreck partially buried in grass
primitive wooden platform structure built among the ruins
patches of distinctive red-pink tall grass
clusters of small yellow flowers along the path edge

segments.scene_description: Aloy continues through the Hollow Fort area along a dirt trail, passing rusted abandoned cars on the left and patches of red grass on the right. The environment features scattered stone ruins, wooden scaffolding structures in the distance, and mixed vegetation as the ancient tower moves to the right side of the frame.

events.description: character steps from dirt path into shallow river water, creating splashes

agents.ego_description: Aloy wades into a shallow river, creating ripples and splashes as she moves through the water

entered.detail: clear shallow water with visible stones and algae on the riverbed
rocks covered in green moss visible beneath the water surface

segments.scene_description: The segment concludes as Aloy enters a shallow river, transitioning from the dirt path to wading through clear water. The camera follows her as she moves through the stream, with mossy stones visible beneath the surface and ripples forming around her legs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through overgrown post-apocalyptic ruins that transition from dense vegetation into a shallow riverbed. It begins with a cinematic low-angle view of Aloy against a bright blue sky before shifting to a third-person follow camera as she walks through tall grass past vine-covered ruins and a looming ancient tower. As she continues along a dirt trail, the scenery shifts to reveal rusted abandoned cars and patches of red grass, with the distant tower sliding toward the right side of the frame. The scene then opens up to include wooden scaffolding and scattered stone ruins before finally turning toward a clear stream. The movement concludes as Aloy leaves the path to wade through the shallow river, with the camera capturing ripples forming around her legs and mossy stones beneath the water's surface.
